site.title: Useful Tools
site.tagline: Free tools that run right in your browser. Your files never leave your device.

home.heading: Tools
home.subheading: Pick a tool and use it instantly.

qr.title: QR Code Generator
qr.description: Turn any link or text into a QR code and save it as PNG or SVG.
qr.emptyHint: Enter a URL or text above to see your QR code.
qr.ecHint: Higher levels survive more damage but make a denser code.
qr.lowContrast: Foreground/background contrast is too low — the code may not scan.
qr.invertedColors: Light foreground on a dark background may fail on some scanners.
qr.renderFailed: Could not generate the QR code. Please check your input.
qr.copyFailed: Copy isn’t supported in this browser. Use download instead.
qr.tooLong: Text is too long to fit in a QR code. Shorten it or lower the error-correction level.
